lines.speaker: Noranna Tytanin
lines.text: You new here? I don't recognise you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's right, I'm [Vampyre name].

lines.speaker: Noranna Tytanin
lines.text: Well, [Vampyre name], welcome to the essence mine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Essence mine?

lines.speaker: Noranna Tytanin
lines.text: That's right. Here, we use the slaves to mine daeyalt essence.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Daeyalt essence? Is that connected to daeyalt ore?

lines.speaker: Noranna Tytanin
lines.text: Indeed it is. Daeyalt ore is a weaker form of daeyalt essence. It still has uses, hence why we have the slaves mine it. The essence here is far more powerful though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where did it come from?

lines.speaker: Noranna Tytanin
lines.text: They say that an object of great power was once stored in this very cave. Apparently, the presence of this object created the daeyalt deposits.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. What is the daeyalt used for?

lines.speaker: Noranna Tytanin
lines.text: Its main use is as a key component in the vampyrification process. There's other uses though. It can be used to create runes, for example.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Am I allowed some?

lines.speaker: Noranna Tytanin
lines.text: The essence mined by the slaves is reserved. If you want some, you'll have to mine your own.

lines.speaker: Noranna Tytanin
lines.text: If you do choose to mine the deposits, you should know that the daeyalt shards you'll get are useless on their own. They'll need converting into essence to be used.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I do that?

lines.speaker: Noranna Tytanin
lines.text: Luckily for you, I can provide that service.

lines.speaker: Noranna Tytanin
lines.text: Whenever you have shards to convert, bring them to me. Normally I'd send the converted essence straight to your bank, but as you seem to carry all of your belongings yourself, I'll just give it right to you instead.

lines.speaker: Noranna Tytanin
lines.text: Whenever you have shards to convert, bring them to me. I will send the converted essence straight to your bank.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great! Thanks for the help.

lines.speaker: Noranna Tytanin
lines.text: Oh, one other thing. The daeyalt almost seems to have a mind of its own. Only one deposit will be active at a time. You'll need to pay attention to which one it is.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. I'll bear that in mind.

lines.speaker: Noranna Tytanin
lines.text: Need something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you convert some shards for me?

lines.speaker: Noranna Tytanin
lines.text: As you wish. I'll give any shards I convert straight to you. How many would you like me to convert?

lines.speaker: Noranna Tytanin
lines.text: As you wish. Once I convert these shards, I will send them to your bank. How many would you like me to convert?

lines.speaker: Noranna Tytanin
lines.text: No. You don't have any.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about daeyalt.

lines.speaker: Noranna Tytanin
lines.text: It comes in two forms, essence and ores. Both have their uses, but the essence is far more powerful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And it's only found here?

lines.speaker: Noranna Tytanin
lines.text: Yes. They say that an object of great power was once stored in this very cave. Apparently, the presence of this object created the daeyalt deposits.

lines.speaker: Noranna Tytanin
lines.text: The main use of daeyalt is as a key component in the vampyrification process. There's other uses though. The essence can be used to create runes, for example.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And I'm allowed to mine it?

lines.speaker: Noranna Tytanin
lines.text: Indeed. However, you should know that the daeyalt shards you'll get are useless on their own. They'll need converting into essence to be used. That is a service I can provide.

lines.speaker: Noranna Tytanin
lines.text: Whenever you have shards to convert, bring them to me. Normally I'd send the converted essence straight to your bank, but as you seem to carry all of your belongings yourself, I'll just give it right to you instead.

lines.speaker: Noranna Tytanin
lines.text: Whenever you have shards to convert, bring them to me. I will send the converted essence straight to your bank.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Thanks for the information.

lines.speaker: Noranna Tytanin
lines.text: Do you need something else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm good.

sections.title: If the player is not disguised

lines.speaker: Noranna Tytanin
lines.text: You're not one of the slaves assigned to this mine! Go back to the pens before I call the guards!
